reference_images.label: proxy_pixel_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Proxy pixel-density board for warm low-resolution scenes because the Pico Echo image generator was cancelled before upload.

reference_images.label: proxy_character_silhouette
reference_images.purpose: Proxy sprite silhouette reference for keeping the playable bird readable at 1x scale.

reference_images.label: proxy_environment_spacing
reference_images.purpose: Proxy room-layout reference for placing floor, perch, and prop anchors inside a tiny scene.

reference_images.label: proxy_hud_density
reference_images.purpose: Proxy UI spacing reference for compact bars, buttons, and bubbles in a 128x128 frame.

bevy_constraints.sprite_pipeline: Author each PNG for nearest-neighbor sampling, render with an orthographic 2D camera, and keep transforms on integer pixels.
bevy_constraints.ecs_model: Use separate entities for cage shell, foreground bars, feed props, cleanup feedback, Echo animation sheets, happiness HUD, care popup, and status bubbles.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load all Pico Echo trial_5 PNG handles during a Loading state with AssetServer and keep them in a typed resource keyed by asset_key.
runtime_notes: Create TextureAtlasLayout resources during startup before gameplay begins for every sheet-based asset.
Render world and obstacle layers behind Echo, keep the foreground bar overlay above Echo, and draw UI on a separate overlay camera layer.
Use fixed-timestep timers for state-sheet playback so idle, eating, sleeping, and HUD animations stay deterministic.
Keep every sprite origin and translation on whole pixels to avoid shimmer in the 128x128 presentation.

mechanic_coverage.label: Feed Echo and clear hunger
mechanic_coverage.description: The player fills the bowl, Echo pecks through the food animation, and the interface confirms the recovery without leaving the cozy cage view.

mechanic_coverage.label: Clean the cage floor
mechanic_coverage.description: The bottom band accumulates dirt marks, the player swipes to clear them, and a brief sparkle confirms the low-stress cleanup loop.

mechanic_coverage.label: Pet Echo and observe reward behavior
mechanic_coverage.description: Touch feedback shifts Echo into happy or singing poses while the bubble system adds concise emotion cues near the head space.

mechanic_coverage.label: Night rest and wake cycle
mechanic_coverage.description: Echo transitions into a tucked sleeping pose during the configured rest window and surfaces readable sleep cues without changing the room shell.

mechanic_coverage.label: Track the steady happiness baseline
mechanic_coverage.description: The happiness bar communicates the 50 to 100 comfort range while care actions and calm observation shift the color thresholds.

source_material.image_status: Original workflow image generation was cancelled before upload, so actual repo PNG proxies are used for pixel-density grounding while the Pico Echo GDD remains the content authority.

kb_findings: Art Task Plan KB shows Pico_Echo trial 5 passed in iterations 6 and 7, with older iteration 4 and 5 fail history present.
Meta Iteration KB records iteration 5 dependency and grouping issues plus iteration 6 infrastructure anomalies, while iteration 7 reached a full PASS run.
avoidance_actions: Created every required category with at least one asset JSON.
Kept manifest task_id, asset_key, file path, execution order, and variant lineage aligned.
Embedded reference_images and Bevy constraints in the package and every asset.
Used a complete folder package contract instead of legacy single-file output.
